title: polypodium calirhiza
intro: Polypodium calirhiza, also known as rattlesnake fern, is a perennial plant species found in North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Polypodium calirhiza can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to aid in wound healing and to reduce pain.
